title: stenogyne elliptica
intro: Stenogyne elliptica, also known as Hawaiian mountain mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stenogyne elliptica include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and alleviation of respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb for treating various ailments. Herbal preparations of Stenogyne elliptica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for easy integration into a wellness routine.
